displayTitle: The Paper That Runs Every MT Test

beats.narration: Every magnetic particle test is decided on paper before the first ampere flows. Let's follow the chain of documents, top to bottom.

payload.title: DECIDED ON PAPER
payload.sub: How codes, procedures, and technique sheets run every test.

beats.narration: The code says what must be accomplished. The Level Three's procedure says how. The technique sheet gives this part's exact numbers.

payload.heading: The document chain, top to bottom

beats.narration: Those numbers were proven with shims or a gaussmeter at qualification. Stretch prod spacing or change amperage — the proof no longer covers you.

payload.heading: The numbers on the sheet are proven
payload.note: CHANGE THE NUMBERS, LOSE THE PROOF

beats.narration: Welds follow welding and pressure codes. Pipe and tubing follow purchaser specs. Aerospace is strictest — wet fluorescent, no prods. Railroads, cranes, automotive: same pattern.
The habit: read the sheet, confirm everything matches, and when the part disagrees, stop and ask. The paper isn't red tape — it's the test.

payload.sub: The paper isn't red tape — it is the test.
